chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-61 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.09.2024 Mr. Altaf Sachal Awan advocate for applicant. Mr. Abdul Rasool Abbasi advocate for respondents. Ms. Rameshan Oad, A.P.G. -.-.-. Heard learned counsel for the parties, APG and perused the impugned order. From perusal of impugned order, it reflects that the complaint was dismissed by assigning reasons in para No.5, which are reproduced as under: 5. The entry which was said to be bogus or forged as per report of enquiry officer was recorded in relevant register on re-constitution of record which was being re-constituted on accounts of its loss at the hands of provoked mob on death of Mohterma Benazir Bhutto. It might be a human mistake. Be that as it may be such entry now is cancelled by the Mukhtiarkar, Johi. If it is so, then the grievance of the complainant if any is appearing to have been resolved. The filing of the instant direct complaint is appearing to be an attempt on the part of the complainant to have possession of his landed property back which according to him is lying with the proposed accused to some extent, by involving them before this court. For return of the possession of the landed property, if it is lying with someone else, the complainant has an adequate and alternate remedy before Civil and Criminal Courts having jurisdiction by way of filing a suit for possession or a direct complaint for recovery of possession under the provisions of Illegal Dispossession Act.” No illegally or infirmity is found in the impugned order, the same is maintained.

The filing of the instant direct complaint is appearing to be an attempt on the part of the complainant to have possession of his landed property back which according to him is lying with the proposed accused to some extent, by involving them before this court. For return of the possession of the landed property, if it is lying with someone else, the complainant has an adequate and alternate remedy before Civil and Criminal Courts having jurisdiction by way of filing a suit for possession or a direct complaint for recovery of possession under the provisions of Illegal Dispossession Act.” No illegally or infirmity is found in the impugned order, the same is maintained. Result thereof, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed. J U D G E Ali Haider
